custom_audio_note: Custom audio overrides defaults. Heart sounds play at cardiac points, lung sounds at lung fields.
empty_fill_hint: Click "Fill All Defaults" to initialize all regions with normal findings.
empty_select_hint: Click on the body map or use the buttons below
empty_select_region: Select a body region to configure findings
heading: 6. Physical Examination
heading_help: Configure physical examination findings for each body region. Click a region to edit.
normal_defaults_note: Normal findings use default heart/lung sounds automatically
